name: sequence-review
title: Sequence review
description: Interpret a sequence or mutation, optionally predict structure with ESMFold, and suggest wet-lab next steps with controls. Research use only.

tasks.title: Interpret sequence
tasks.description: Review the user-provided sequence or mutation: type, length, notable motifs, and hypotheses. Use analyze_sequence when sequence text is provided.

tasks.title: Structure prediction
tasks.description: If the sequence is protein and length allows, call fold_protein and summarize the PDB path and confidence. Skip with reason if not appropriate.

tasks.title: Wet-lab next steps
tasks.description: Suggest experimental follow-up: controls, replicates, assays, and safety. Clearly separate in silico predictions from experiments.
